articles.title: Google Search AI annoys users; DuckDuckGo gains.
articles.summary: Google added AI to Search. Many users dislike it. DuckDuckGo saw installs rise 30%.
articles.impact: People are choosing search engines that don't force AI on them.

articles.title: Windows 11 update makes PCs faster.
articles.summary: A new Windows 11 update is live. It makes your computer run better. It is faster and more responsive.
articles.impact: Your Windows 11 computer should feel much quicker after the update.

articles.title: Free costumes for Street Fighter 6 characters.
articles.summary: New free costumes are coming soon. They are for all Street Fighter 6 characters. Get them this week.
articles.impact: Players can dress up their favorite fighters for free soon.

articles.title: Resident Evil Requiem demo is out now.
articles.summary: Play a demo of Resident Evil Requiem. It's for PS5, Xbox, Switch 2, and PC. Try it before release.
articles.impact: You can try the new Resident Evil game before it is fully released.

articles.title: Pokemon GO events for June 2026 announced.
articles.summary: June 2026 events for Pokemon GO are here. New Pokemon are featured. Many in-game events are planned.
articles.impact: Pokemon GO players have new things to do in June.

articles.title: PlayStation shuts down servers for game.
articles.summary: PlayStation removed a game. Destruction AllStars servers are off. It is no longer for sale.
articles.impact: The online game Destruction AllStars is no longer playable or available.

articles.title: Apple MacBook deals still active.
articles.summary: Some Memorial Day sales on Apple gear are still on. You can get MacBooks and AirPods. Prices are lower.
articles.impact: You can still save money on Apple laptops and earbuds after the holiday.

articles.title: PC makers react to Apple's new laptops.
articles.summary: PC companies are making new laptops. They respond to Apple's MacBook Neo. Good cheap laptops are rare.
articles.impact: Competitors are creating new, affordable laptops to compete with Apple.
